description: CompositionGrey melange bikini made of 100% premium cotton in a 2X1 rib, has a fabric covered elastic waistband with brand tab on the front, double layered contoured pouch, flat seam details and printed label on the innerFittingMid riseWash careMachine wash warm at 40 degrees with like coloursDo not bleachTumble dry lowDry cleanableThis mid-rise bikini from facit is crafted using pure cotton in a 2X1 knit that lets the fabric contour your hips and allows you to stretch in ease. The bikini provides a smooth Fit without binding, while the printed label on the inside provides abrasion-free comfort.Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model with waist 34" and hips 38"
